info.title: WARE2DOOR API
info.description:
## WARE2DOOR Logistics API

End-to-end logistics platform covering warehouse management, transit hub scanning, last-mile delivery, RTO lifecycle, and super-user administration.

### Authentication
Protected endpoints require an **`x-role`** header specifying the caller's role.

Click the **Authorize 🔒** button, then enter one of the allowed values:

| Role Value | Access |
|---|---|
| `WAREHOUSE` | Warehouse management endpoints |
| `TRANSIT_HUB` | Transit hub scan & reports endpoints |
| `LOCAL_AGENCY` | Agency delivery & agent endpoints |
| `SUPER_USER` | Full administrative access |

> **Public endpoints** (login, verify-email, track, raise-ticket) do **not** require this header.

x-role.name: x-role
x-role.description: Role-based access header. Allowed values: WAREHOUSE | TRANSIT_HUB | LOCAL_AGENCY | SUPER_USER

hubId.description: Transit hub ID to route through

agencyId.description: Local agency ID for last-mile delivery

email.description: Email to verify / send OTP to
Email address to reset password for

phone.description: Valid 10-digit mobile number with optional country code

labelID.description: Optional label ID for the stock item

itemName.description: Name of the item being added to stock

productName.description: Name of the product being shipped

notes.description: Additional notes about the failed attempt

description.example: My shipment has been delayed for over 5 days.
description.description: Detailed description of the issue (min 10 characters)

trackingId.description: Tracking ID of the shipment to scan

name.description: Full name of the delivery agent

phone.description: Valid 10-digit phone number with optional country code

area.description: Delivery area assigned to the agent

trackingId.description: Tracking ID of the shipment to assign

agentId.description: ID of the agent to assign

city.description: City where the node is located

active.description: Set to true to activate, false to deactivate the admin

admin.description: Name of the admin performing the action (max 80 chars)

module.description: Module where the action was performed (max 60 chars)

details.example: Cancelled all pending shipments for WH-HYD-001
details.description: Detailed description of the action (max 500 chars)

lowStockThreshold.description: Threshold below which stock is flagged as low (1-10000)

maxRtoAttempts.description: Maximum delivery attempts before initiating RTO (1-10)
